name: machine
description: The machine marketplace — the portable Claude Code payload plus its companion plugins (kern, git-fs, split).

plugins.name: machine
plugins.description: The machine — portable Claude Code payload (agents, skills, hooks, output styles, hub + board + context7 + pdf-reader + context-mode MCP servers).

plugins.name: kern
plugins.description: kern memory — self-organizing knowledge-graph agent memory. Auto-captures each turn, recalls relevant thoughts per prompt, and exposes the kern MCP tools. Ships its own capture/recall hooks; requires the `kern` CLI on PATH.

plugins.name: git-fs
plugins.description: git-fs — copy-on-write overlay filesystem over the working directory, backed by a dedicated bare git store. N agents, 1 repo, 0 collisions.

plugins.name: split
plugins.description: split — fn-level code index MCP server. Splits source files into per-function body files for token-efficient navigation; bidirectional watcher syncs edits.
